---
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

toc: false
anchor-sections: true

listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/algorithm-notes/index.qmd"
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---
```{=html}
<script>
document.body.classList.add("sx-home-page");
</script>

<style>
/* =========================================================
   sanxi 首页补丁：只放在 index.qmd 内，不覆盖 styles.css
   目的：修复 HTML 被当作代码显示、关闭右侧目录、删除可调试小部件
========================================================= */

body.sx-home-page {
  background: transparent !important;
}

body.sx-home-page::before {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -2;
  background-image: url("assets/img/home-bg.jpg?v=20260703-home-fixed");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}

body.sx-home-page::after {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -1;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* 首页不要右侧目录 */
body.sx-home-page #quarto-margin-sidebar,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-margin-sidebar,
body.sx-home-page .sidebar.margin-sidebar,
body.sx-home-page nav#TOC {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 首页主体透明 */
body.sx-home-page main,
body.sx-home-page .page-columns,
body.sx-home-page .content,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-container {
  background: transparent !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .page-columns {
  display: block !important;
}

body.sx-home-page main.content,
body.sx-home-page .page-columns main.content {
  max-width: none !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
}

/* 顶部导航栏：保持你之前调好的毛玻璃效果 */
body.sx-home-page #quarto-header,
body.sx-home-page header#quarto-header {
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .navbar {
  min-height: 58px !important;
  padding-top: 6px !important;
  padding-bottom: 6px !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(1.18) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(1.18) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12) !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24) !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .navbar-container,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .container-fluid,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-collapse,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-brand-container,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-nav,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-nav-scroll {
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border: none !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .navbar .navbar-brand,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .navbar-title,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .nav-link,
body.sx-home-page .navbar a {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.94) !important;
  font-weight: 850 !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .navbar .nav-link:hover,
body.sx-home-page .navbar a:hover {
  color: #2563eb !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .navbar .container-fluid,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-container {
  min-height: 46px !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  align-items: center !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .navbar .nav-link,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .navbar-brand {
  padding-top: 8px !important;
  padding-bottom: 8px !important;
  line-height: 1.2 !important;
}

/* 首页容器 */
.sx-home {
  max-width: 1180px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3.2rem 1.2rem 5rem 1.2rem;
}

.sx-home-main-title {
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4.6vw, 4.6rem);
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.07em;
  line-height: 1.05;
  margin: 0 0 0.65rem 0;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  text-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.48);
}

.sx-home-subtitle {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  line-height: 1.85;
  margin-bottom: 2.3rem;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
}

.sx-home-section-title {
  color: #ffffff !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3vw, 2.55rem);
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.05em;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58);
  padding-bottom: 0.65rem;
  margin: 2.4rem 0 1.4rem 0;
  text-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42);
}

/* 顶部左右布局 */
.sx-hero-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(320px, 0.95fr);
  gap: 18px;
  align-items: stretch;
  margin: 2rem 0 1.8rem 0;
}

/* 玻璃卡片 */
.sx-intro-card,
.sx-status-card,
.sx-mini-card,
.sx-nav-card,
.sx-tag-cloud,
.sx-note-box {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) !important;
  border-radius: 18px;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
}

.sx-intro-card {
  padding: 2.35rem;
  min-height: 420px;
}

.sx-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
}

.sx-intro-card h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 4vw, 3.05rem);
  line-height: 1.07;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.065em;
  margin: 0 0 1.35rem 0;
  color: #202020;
}

.sx-intro-card p {
  color: #555555;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
}

.sx-button-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.sx-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 9px 16px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-weight: 750;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.12);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.sx-btn-dark {
  background: #111111;
  color: #ffffff !important;
}

.sx-btn-light {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  color: #222222 !important;
}

.sx-btn:hover {
  text-decoration: none;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.sx-status-card {
  padding: 2rem 1.6rem;
  height: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
}

.sx-status-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 1.45rem;
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  color: #222222;
}

.sx-status-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 118px minmax(0, 1fr);
  column-gap: 18px;
  align-items: start;
  padding: 1.08rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.08);
}

.sx-status-item:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.sx-status-label {
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sx-status-value {
  color: #202020;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  line-height: 1.75;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
}

/* 互动小部件 */
.sx-three-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
  align-items: start;
}

.sx-mini-card {
  padding: 1.45rem;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}

.sx-daily-card {
  height: auto !important;
}

.sx-card-label {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: #555555;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.sx-daily-line {
  font-size: 1.18rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  color: #222222;
  line-height: 1.65;
  word-break: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.sx-small-btn {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  padding: 7px 13px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.12);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  color: #222222;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
}

.sx-small-btn:hover {
  background: #111111;
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sx-mood-word {
  font-size: 2.35rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  color: #222222;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin: 0.35rem 0 0.7rem 0;
}

.sx-mood-date,
.sx-mood-meta,
.sx-muted {
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.94rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.sx-mood-title {
  color: #333333;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.sx-mood-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.25rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.sx-text-link {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  color: #2563eb;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.sx-text-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* 学习进度条 */
.sx-progress-item {
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.sx-progress-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 12px;
  color: #555555;
  font-size: 0.94rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.sx-progress-row strong {
  color: #111111;
}

.sx-progress-track {
  height: 8px;
  background: #eeeeee;
  border-radius: 999px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.sx-progress-bar {
  height: 100%;
  background: #111111;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

/* 内容导航：附件 3 风格 */
.sx-feature-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.35fr 0.65fr 0.65fr;
  grid-template-rows: repeat(2, minmax(210px, auto));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem 0;
}

.sx-lower-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 0.7fr 0.7fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 0 0 2rem 0;
}

.sx-nav-card {
  display: block;
  padding: 1.8rem;
  min-height: 210px;
  color: #111827 !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
}

.sx-nav-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: #111827 !important;
}

.sx-nav-card-large {
  grid-row: span 2;
  min-height: 438px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.sx-focus-card {
  min-height: 240px;
}

.sx-nav-card h3 {
  color: #222222;
  font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2.2vw, 2rem);
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  margin: 0.75rem 0 0.65rem 0;
}

.sx-nav-card-large h3 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.2vw, 2.75rem);
}

.sx-nav-card p {
  color: #555555;
  line-height: 1.85;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.sx-icon {
  width: 62px;
  height: 62px;
  border-radius: 18px;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  background: #f8fafc;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  color: #111827;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
}

/* 标签云：无超链接 */
.sx-tag-cloud {
  padding: 1.3rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
}

.sx-tag-cloud span {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246, 246, 246, 0.92);
  color: #333333;
  font-weight: 650;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.07);
}

.sx-note-box {
  padding: 1.4rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
  color: #555555;
  line-height: 1.9;
}

.quarto-listing .quarto-post {
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) !important;
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  padding: 1.5rem !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
}

.quarto-listing .quarto-post:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2) !important;
}

/* 响应式 */
@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .sx-home {
    max-width: 100%;
    padding: 2.2rem 1rem 4rem 1rem;
  }

  .sx-hero-grid,
  .sx-three-grid,
  .sx-feature-grid,
  .sx-lower-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .sx-nav-card-large {
    grid-row: auto;
    min-height: 260px;
  }

  .sx-status-item {
    grid-template-columns: 130px minmax(0, 1fr);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .sx-status-item {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    row-gap: 0.25rem;
  }

  .sx-status-label {
    white-space: normal;
  }
}
/* =========================================================
   首页最终对齐补丁
   修改问题：
   1. 顶部标题与左侧大卡片左边对齐
   2. 内容导航、标签云、文章列表整体宽度与互动小部件一致
   3. 第一张大卡片标题改成黑色
   4. 右侧固定目录不参与正文宽度计算
   ========================================================= */

/* 统一首页内容宽度变量：
   --sx-home-content-width 控制正文主体宽度
   --sx-home-right-space 给右侧固定目录预留空间 */
body.sx-home-page {
  --sx-home-content-width: 960px;
  --sx-home-right-space: 460px;
  --sx-home-side-padding: 2rem;
}

/* 修改问题 1：
   首页主体不要再受旧的 max-width: 980px 限制。
   原因：旧代码里 .sx-home 最大宽度太窄，后面又有其他网格宽度，导致标题和卡片对不齐。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home {
  max-width: none !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
}

/* 修改问题 1 + 2：
   下面这些部分全部使用同一个宽度：
   顶部标题、顶部副标题、上方介绍卡片、互动小部件、内容导航、标签云、文章列表。
   这样它们的左边线会完全对齐。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home > h1,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home > p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home-main-title,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home-subtitle,
body.sx-home-page .sx-hero-grid,
body.sx-home-page .sx-three-grid,
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-grid,
body.sx-home-page .sx-tag-cloud,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing {
  width: min(
    calc(100vw - var(--sx-home-right-space) - var(--sx-home-side-padding) * 2),
    var(--sx-home-content-width)
  ) !important;

  max-width: var(--sx-home-content-width) !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}

/* 修改问题 1：
   顶部标题改成左对齐。
   这样它的左边会和下面左侧大卡片左边对齐，类似你附件2的效果。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home > h1,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home-main-title {
  text-align: left !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  text-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.48) !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem !important;
}

/* 修改问题 1：
   顶部副标题也跟标题同一左边线，不再居中。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home > p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home-subtitle {
  text-align: left !important;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96) !important;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38) !important;
  margin-bottom: 2.2rem !important;
}

/* 修改问题 3：
   第一张大卡片里的“把学习、代码、建模、阅读和普通日子都留下来”改成黑色。
   原因：首页全局 h2 白色样式影响到了卡片内部标题。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-intro-card h2 {
  color: #111111 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 修改问题 2：
   互动小部件整体宽度作为基准，保持三栏排布。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-three-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: 18px !important;
}

/* 修改问题 2：
   内容导航改成和互动小部件一样的总宽度。
   左侧数学笔记占大块，右侧四个小卡片。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 1.45fr 0.85fr 0.85fr !important;
  grid-template-rows: repeat(2, minmax(210px, auto)) !important;
  gap: 18px !important;
}

/* 修改问题 2：
   如果你当前内容导航还使用旧类名 sx-nav-grid，也一起限制宽度。
   这样无论你用 sx-feature-grid 还是 sx-nav-grid，都不会跑偏。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: 18px !important;
}

/* 修改问题 2：
   下方 Mood Journal / About / 专注模式，也跟上方内容导航同宽。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 0.75fr 0.75fr 1.5fr !important;
  gap: 18px !important;
  margin-top: 18px !important;
}

/* 修改问题 2：
   数学笔记大卡片占两行，保持附件3那种大卡片效果。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card-large {
  grid-row: span 2 !important;
  min-height: 450px !important;
}

/* 修改问题 2：
   内容导航标题、标签云标题、文章列表标题也统一宽度。
   这些标题之前会贴到最左边，现在统一和卡片左边线对齐。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home > h2,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home-section-title,
body.sx-home-page #interactive-widgets,
body.sx-home-page #content-navigation,
body.sx-home-page #tag-cloud,
body.sx-home-page #post-list {
  width: min(
    calc(100vw - var(--sx-home-right-space) - var(--sx-home-side-padding) * 2),
    var(--sx-home-content-width)
  ) !important;

  max-width: var(--sx-home-content-width) !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;

  color: #ffffff !important;
  text-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45) !important;
}

/* 修改问题 4：
   右侧固定目录保持固定，不随着页面滑动。
   它不占正文宽度，所以正文需要通过上面的 --sx-home-right-space 给它让位置。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home-fixed-toc {
  position: fixed !important;
  top: 6.4rem !important;
  right: 6rem !important;
  width: 230px !important;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 7.2rem) !important;
  overflow-y: auto !important;
  z-index: 80 !important;

  padding: 1rem 1.1rem !important;
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
}

/* 修改问题 4：
   目录标题和链接样式。 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home-fixed-toc-title {
  font-size: 0.95rem !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-home-fixed-toc a {
  display: block !important;
  padding: 0.28rem 0 !important;
  color: #374151 !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 0.92rem !important;
  line-height: 1.45 !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-home-fixed-toc a:hover {
  color: #2563eb !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* 修改问题 2：
   文章列表卡片缩小，不要像之前那样巨大。 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  padding: 1.15rem 1.25rem !important;
  border-radius: 18px !important;
}

/* 小屏幕时取消右侧目录，所有内容恢复正常单栏。 */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  body.sx-home-page {
    --sx-home-right-space: 0px;
    --sx-home-side-padding: 1.2rem;
  }

  body.sx-home-page .sx-home-fixed-toc {
    display: none !important;
  }

  body.sx-home-page .sx-three-grid,
  body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid,
  body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid,
  body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card-large {
    grid-row: auto !important;
    min-height: 260px !important;
  }
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：互动小部件 和 内容导航 两部分距离太远
   修改方法：
   1. 缩小互动小部件卡片区域下方间距
   2. 缩小“内容导航”标题上方间距
   3. 保持整体宽度和布局不变
========================================================= */

/* 缩小互动小部件这一组三张卡片下面的空白 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-three-grid {
  margin-bottom: 0.05rem !important;
}

/* 缩小“内容导航”标题距离上方卡片的距离 */
body.sx-home-page h2#content-navigation {
  margin-top: -2rem !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}

/* 内容导航标题下面到卡片的距离也稍微收紧 */
body.sx-home-page h2#content-navigation + .sx-feature-grid,
body.sx-home-page h2#content-navigation + .sx-nav-grid {
  margin-top: 0.9rem !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：内容导航卡片高度太长、留白太多
   修改方法：
   1. 缩小内容导航每一行高度
   2. 缩小大卡片“数学笔记”的最小高度
   3. 缩小普通卡片内边距
   4. 保持整体宽度不变
========================================================= */

/* 内容导航上半部分：数学笔记 + 四个小卡片 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid {
  grid-template-rows: repeat(2, minmax(125px, auto)) !important;
  gap: 14px !important;
}

/* 所有内容导航卡片高度缩短 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card {
  min-height: 125px !important;
  padding: 1.15rem !important;
}

/* 左侧“数学笔记”大卡片缩短 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card-large {
  min-height: 200px !important;
}

/* 卡片图标稍微缩小，减少上方留白 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card .sx-icon {
  width: 52px !important;
  height: 52px !important;
  border-radius: 15px !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.55rem !important;
}

/* 内容导航卡片标题缩小一点，避免撑高 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2vw, 1.8rem) !important;
  margin-top: 0.45rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem !important;
}

/* 内容导航卡片说明文字行距稍微收紧 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card p {
  font-size: 1rem !important;
  line-height: 1.65 !important;
}

/* 下方 Mood Journal / 专注模式 / About 这一排也缩短 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid {
  grid-template-columns: 0.75fr 1.5fr 0.75fr !important;
  gap: 14px !important;
  margin-top: 14px !important;
}

/* 专注模式仍然保持接近两个小卡片宽度，但高度不要太长 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card {
  min-height: 135px !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：内容导航卡片字体偏大，导致卡片高度不好压缩
   修改方法：
   1. 缩小内容导航卡片标题字体
   2. 缩小说明文字字体和行距
   3. 缩小图标
   4. 让卡片整体更紧凑
========================================================= */
/* =========================================================
   首页内容导航卡片重新优化
   解决的问题：
   1. 卡片太矮，导致文字显示不全
   2. 下排三个卡片比例难看
   3. 数学笔记图片过于突兀
   4. 标题和说明文字整体更协调
   ========================================================= */

/* ---------- 内容导航整体间距 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid {
  gap: 18px !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid {
  gap: 18px !important;
  margin-top: 18px !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

/* ---------- 所有导航卡片统一外观 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px) !important;
  border-radius: 28px !important;
  padding: 1.45rem 1.45rem 1.35rem 1.45rem !important;
  overflow: visible !important;         /* 关键：防止说明文字被裁掉 */
  height: auto !important;              /* 关键：取消死高度 */
  max-height: none !important;          /* 关键：取消死高度 */
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
}

/* ---------- 上排右侧四个普通卡片 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card:not(.sx-nav-card-large) {
  min-height: 195px !important;
}

/* ---------- 左侧数学笔记大卡片 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large,
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card-large {
  min-height: 390px !important;
  padding: 1.55rem 1.55rem 1.5rem 1.55rem !important;
}

/* ---------- 下排三个卡片：统一更好看的高度 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card {
  min-height: 165px !important;
  height: auto !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  padding: 1.3rem 1.35rem !important;
}

/* ---------- 专注模式：比普通小卡稍宽，但不要太扁 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card {
  min-height: 165px !important;
  height: auto !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84) !important;  /* 解决透明度过高问题 */
}

/* ---------- 图标统一 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card .sx-icon,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card .sx-icon {
  width: 56px !important;
  height: 56px !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  font-size: 1.05rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.95rem !important;
  flex-shrink: 0 !important;
}

/* ---------- 普通卡片标题统一 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.16rem !important;
  line-height: 1.24 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  margin: 0 0 0.65rem 0 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em !important;
  color: #242424 !important;
}

/* ---------- 左侧大卡标题单独大一点 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card-large h3 {
  font-size: 1.95rem !important;
  line-height: 1.12 !important;
  margin: 0 0 0.8rem 0 !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  color: #202020 !important;
}

/* ---------- 所有说明文字统一 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card p {
  font-size: 0.94rem !important;
  line-height: 1.58 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: #4b5563 !important;
  display: block !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* ---------- 数学笔记图片：缩小并更协调 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-math-cover {
  display: block !important;
  width: 58% !important;
  max-width: 260px !important;
  height: 92px !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  margin: 0.2rem auto 1rem auto !important;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10) !important;
}

/* ---------- 避免图片把大卡片撑得太夸张 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large .sx-icon {
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem !important;
}

/* ---------- 专注模式、About、Mood 标题不要过大 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.08rem !important;
  line-height: 1.22 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card p {
  font-size: 0.9rem !important;
  line-height: 1.52 !important;
}

/* ---------- 专注模式正文稍微收紧，防止一行过长难看 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card p {
  max-width: 95% !important;
}

/* ---------- 如果你之前写过固定高度，这里强制清掉 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card-large,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large,
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card {
  height: auto !important;
  max-height: none !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：内容导航区域字体大小不统一
   修改目标：
   1. 除左侧“数学笔记”大卡片外，其余所有卡片标题字号完全一样
   2. 除左侧“数学笔记”大卡片外，其余所有卡片说明文字字号完全一样
   3. 左侧“数学笔记”允许标题和说明文字略大
   4. 专注模式、About、MOOD JOURNAL 与上方小卡片字体保持一致
========================================================= */

/* 1. 先统一所有内容导航卡片的基础文字状态 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card {
  font-family: "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 2. 除“数学笔记”大卡片外，所有小卡片标题完全统一
   包括：数学建模、MATLAB、数值分析、算法图解、MOOD JOURNAL、专注模式、About */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card:not(.sx-topic-card-large) h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-focus-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.22rem !important;
  line-height: 1.18 !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em !important;
  margin-top: 0.22rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.26rem !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 3. 除“数学笔记”大卡片外，所有小卡片说明文字完全统一 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card:not(.sx-topic-card-large) p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-focus-card p {
  font-size: 0.86rem !important;
  line-height: 1.52 !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0 !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  color: #4b5563 !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 4. 左侧“数学笔记”大卡片标题单独略大 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card-large h3 {
  font-size: 1.55rem !important;
  line-height: 1.18 !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em !important;
  margin-top: 0.25rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.28rem !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 5. 左侧“数学笔记”大卡片说明文字略大一点 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card-large p {
  font-size: 0.94rem !important;
  line-height: 1.58 !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0 !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  color: #4b5563 !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 6. 所有图标大小统一，避免图标大小影响卡片视觉比例 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card:not(.sx-topic-card-large) .sx-icon,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card .sx-icon {
  width: 42px !important;
  height: 42px !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  font-size: 0.9rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem !important;
}

/* 7. 左侧大卡片图标可以略大一点 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card-large .sx-icon {
  width: 46px !important;
  height: 46px !important;
  border-radius: 13px !important;
  font-size: 1rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem !important;
}

/* 8. 专注模式强制取消特殊透明效果，保证和其他小卡片一致 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-focus-card {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  filter: none !important;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：文章列表右侧图片没有显示
   修改方法：
   1. 取消之前对 thumbnail / listing-image 的隐藏
   2. 把文章列表改成：左侧日期，中间文字，右侧图片
   3. 图片显示在右侧，效果接近参考图
========================================================= */

/* 文章卡片整体：三栏布局 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 150px minmax(0, 1fr) 280px !important;
  gap: 1.5rem !important;
  align-items: center !important;

  min-height: 210px !important;
  padding: 1.35rem 1.55rem !important;
  border-radius: 22px !important;

  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
}

/* 左侧日期区域 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .metadata {
  grid-column: 1 !important;
  grid-row: 1 !important;
  align-self: start !important;
  color: #222222 !important;
  font-size: 0.92rem !important;
  line-height: 1.7 !important;
}

/* 中间正文区域 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .body {
  grid-column: 2 !important;
  grid-row: 1 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

/* 文章标题 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-title,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-title a {
  font-size: 1.55rem !important;
  line-height: 1.25 !important;
  font-weight: 850 !important;
  color: #1f2937 !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* 文章副标题/描述 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-subtitle,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-description {
  font-size: 1.02rem !important;
  line-height: 1.75 !important;
  color: #374151 !important;
}

/* 右侧图片区域：关键，重新显示图片 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .thumbnail,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-image {
  display: block !important;
  grid-column: 3 !important;
  grid-row: 1 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 150px !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
}

/* 图片本身 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post img.thumbnail-image,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .thumbnail img,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-image img {
  display: block !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
}

/* 分类标签不要太大 */
body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-categories {
  margin-top: 0.45rem !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-category {
  font-size: 0.78rem !important;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.45rem !important;
}

/* 小屏幕文章列表改成单栏 */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .metadata,
  body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .body,
  body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .thumbnail,
  body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-image {
    grid-column: 1 !important;
  }

  body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .thumbnail,
  body.sx-home-page .quarto-listing .quarto-post .listing-image {
    height: 180px !important;
  }
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：数学笔记大卡片里的图片太大
   修改方法：
   1. 强制限制图片宽度
   2. 强制限制图片高度
   3. 图片居中显示
   4. 不让图片把文字区域挤没
========================================================= */

body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card-large img.sx-topic-cover {
  display: block !important;

  /* 控制图片宽度：数值越小，图片越窄 */
  width: 3% !important;
  max-width: 18px !important;

  /* 控制图片高度：数值越小，图片越矮 */
  height: 60px !important;

  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;

  border-radius: 16px !important;
  margin: 0.35rem auto 0.55rem auto !important;

  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12) !important;
  opacity: 0.96 !important;

  /* 关键：防止图片被 flex 拉伸 */
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
}

/* 数学笔记大卡片内部重新收紧，避免图片撑开整张卡 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card-large {
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  gap: 0.45rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* 数学笔记文字区域不要被图片挤掉 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card-large .sx-topic-card-text {
  display: block !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：数学笔记大卡片高度太高，底部留白太多
   修改方法：
   1. 固定内容导航上半区每一行高度
   2. 数学笔记大卡片跨两行，但整体高度被压低
   3. 图片高度继续保持较小，不撑开卡片
========================================================= */

/* 控制内容导航上半部分两行的高度
   数值越小，数学笔记大卡片整体越矮 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid {
  grid-template-rows: repeat(2, 155px) !important;
  gap: 12px !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

/* 普通小卡片高度跟随网格，不要自己撑高 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card:not(.sx-topic-card-large) {
  height: 155px !important;
  min-height: 155px !important;
  padding: 1rem 1.05rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* 数学笔记大卡片高度 = 两行高度 + 中间 gap
   155 * 2 + 12 = 322px */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card-large {
  height: 322px !important;
  min-height: 322px !important;
  max-height: 322px !important;
  padding: 1rem 1.05rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;

  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  gap: 0.45rem !important;
}

/* 数学笔记里面的图片不要撑高大卡片 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card-large img.sx-topic-cover {
  width: 62% !important;
  max-width: 280px !important;
  height: 78px !important;
  max-height: 78px !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  border-radius: 13px !important;
  margin: 0.25rem auto 0.45rem auto !important;
  flex: 0 0 78px !important;
}

/* 数学笔记文字区收紧 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card-large h3 {
  font-size: 1.45rem !important;
  line-height: 1.12 !important;
  margin-top: 0.1rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid a.sx-topic-card-large p {
  font-size: 0.86rem !important;
  line-height: 1.45 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   最终修复：内容导航高度没有变化
   修改原因：
   之前用 .sx-feature-grid / .sx-topic-card-large 可能被旧样式覆盖，
   或者真实结构不是这个类名。
   这里改用 href 精准锁定每张卡片，所以一定能控制高度。
========================================================= */

/* 1. 内容导航上方整体网格高度压缩 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-feature-grid,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home .sx-nav-grid {
  grid-template-rows: repeat(2, 135px) !important;
  gap: 12px !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

/* 2. 精准锁定左侧“数学笔记”大卡片 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="notes.html"] {
  height: 282px !important;        /* 135 * 2 + 12 = 282 */
  min-height: 282px !important;
  max-height: 282px !important;

  padding: 1rem 1.05rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;

  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  gap: 0.42rem !important;
}

/* 3. 精准锁定数学笔记里面的图片，防止图片撑高卡片 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="notes.html"] img,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="notes.html"] img.sx-topic-cover {
  width: 58% !important;
  max-width: 260px !important;
  height: 72px !important;
  max-height: 72px !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;

  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;

  display: block !important;
  flex: 0 0 72px !important;

  margin: 0.2rem auto 0.45rem auto !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
}

/* 4. 数学笔记标题和说明收紧 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="notes.html"] h3 {
  font-size: 1.35rem !important;
  line-height: 1.12 !important;
  margin-top: 0.05rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="notes.html"] p {
  font-size: 0.82rem !important;
  line-height: 1.38 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

/* 5. 精准锁定右侧四个小卡片高度 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/math-modeling/"],
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/matlab/"],
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/numerical-analysis/"],
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/algorithm/"] {
  height: 135px !important;
  min-height: 135px !important;
  max-height: 135px !important;

  padding: 1rem 1.05rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;

  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  gap: 0.35rem !important;
}

/* 6. 右侧四个小卡片标题统一 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/math-modeling/"] h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/matlab/"] h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/numerical-analysis/"] h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/algorithm/"] h3 {
  font-size: 1.12rem !important;
  line-height: 1.15 !important;
  margin: 0.1rem 0 0.18rem 0 !important;
}

/* 7. 右侧四个小卡片说明统一 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/math-modeling/"] p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/matlab/"] p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/numerical-analysis/"] p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/algorithm/"] p {
  font-size: 0.82rem !important;
  line-height: 1.38 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

/* 8. 图标也压缩一下 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="notes.html"] .sx-icon,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/math-modeling/"] .sx-icon,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/matlab/"] .sx-icon,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/numerical-analysis/"] .sx-icon,
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="topics/algorithm/"] .sx-icon {
  width: 38px !important;
  height: 38px !important;
  border-radius: 11px !important;
  font-size: 0.82rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem !important;
}

/* 9. 下方 Mood Journal / 专注模式 / About 也同步压矮 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="journal.html"],
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="xinliu.html"],
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="about.html"] {
  height: 115px !important;
  min-height: 115px !important;
  max-height: 115px !important;

  padding: 0.9rem 1rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* 10. 专注模式保持宽度，但是高度不要变大 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-home a[href="xinliu.html"] {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   内容导航最终统一修复
   修改问题：
   1. sx-topic-card / sx-nav-card 类名混用导致高度不生效
   2. 数学笔记图片内联样式覆盖 CSS
   3. 内容导航卡片高度太高
   4. 右侧四个卡片和下方三个卡片字体大小不统一
========================================================= */

/* 内容导航整体网格：两行固定高度 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 1.45fr 0.85fr 0.85fr !important;
  grid-template-rows: 135px 135px !important;
  gap: 12px !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

/* 左侧数学笔记大卡片：高度 = 135 * 2 + 12 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large {
  grid-row: span 2 !important;
  height: 282px !important;
  min-height: 282px !important;
  max-height: 282px !important;

  padding: 1rem 1.05rem !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  gap: 0.35rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* 右侧四个小卡片 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card:not(.sx-nav-card-large) {
  height: 135px !important;
  min-height: 135px !important;
  max-height: 135px !important;

  padding: 1rem 1.05rem !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  gap: 0.25rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* 数学笔记图片：这里真正控制图片大小 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large .sx-math-cover {
  width: 62% !important;
  max-width: 260px !important;
  height: 68px !important;
  max-height: 68px !important;
  min-height: 68px !important;

  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;
  display: block !important;

  margin: 0.15rem auto 0.35rem auto !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  flex: 0 0 68px !important;
}

/* 图标统一缩小 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-icon,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-icon {
  width: 38px !important;
  height: 38px !important;
  border-radius: 11px !important;
  font-size: 0.82rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem !important;
}

/* 右侧四个小卡片标题统一 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card:not(.sx-nav-card-large) h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.12rem !important;
  line-height: 1.15 !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  margin: 0.1rem 0 0.18rem 0 !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 右侧四个小卡片说明统一 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card:not(.sx-nav-card-large) p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card p {
  font-size: 0.82rem !important;
  line-height: 1.38 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: #4b5563 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 数学笔记标题略大 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large h3 {
  font-size: 1.35rem !important;
  line-height: 1.12 !important;
  margin: 0.08rem 0 0.18rem 0 !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 数学笔记说明略大一点 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large p {
  font-size: 0.86rem !important;
  line-height: 1.38 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: #4b5563 !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 下方三个卡片压缩高度 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 0.75fr 1.5fr 0.75fr !important;
  gap: 12px !important;
  margin-top: 12px !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card {
  height: 110px !important;
  min-height: 110px !important;
  max-height: 110px !important;
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* 专注模式透明度和其他一致 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-focus-card {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   【内容导航最终高度与间距修正】
   解决的问题：
   1. 上面五个框整体太矮 -> 向下拉长
   2. 下面三个框离上面太远 -> 整体上移
   3. 上下两部分间距尽量一致
   4. 左大卡 + 右四小卡 + 下方三卡 更协调
   ========================================================= */

/* ---------- 内容导航整体容器：整体往上提一点 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page #content-navigation,
body.sx-home-page .sx-content-navigation,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-section {
  margin-top: -58px !important;
}

/* ---------- 上面五个框所在区域：整体间距 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid {
  gap: 18px !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

/* ---------- 左侧大卡片：数学笔记，明显加高 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large,
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card-large {
  min-height: 630px !important;   /* 原来太短，这里直接拉长 */
  height: auto !important;
  padding: 1.45rem 1.45rem 1.35rem 1.45rem !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
}

/* ---------- 上面右侧四个小卡片：每个向下变长一行 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-topic-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card:not(.sx-nav-card-large) {
  min-height: 145px !important;   /* 小卡统一加高 */
  height: auto !important;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.2rem 1.2rem 1.2rem !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
}

/* ---------- 下面三个卡片：整体向上靠近 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid {
  gap: 18px !important;           /* 和上面保持差不多 */
  margin-top: -70px !important;   /* 关键：整体往上提 */
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

/* ---------- 下方三个卡片本身：也稍微高一点，避免文字压缩 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card {
  min-height: 165px !important;
  height: auto !important;
  padding: 1.15rem 1.15rem 1.05rem 1.15rem !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
}

/* ---------- 专注模式：保持横向更宽，同时高度和别的卡片接近 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card {
  min-height: 165px !important;
  height: auto !important;
  padding: 1.15rem 1.2rem 1.05rem 1.2rem !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

/* ---------- 统一所有卡片的外观，防止被旧代码覆盖 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large,
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card {
  overflow: visible !important;
  max-height: none !important;
}

/* ---------- 标题和文字上下间距稍微统一，不然加高后会显得空 ---------- */
body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large h3,
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card h3 {
  margin-bottom: 0.55rem !important;
}

body.sx-home-page .sx-topic-card p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-nav-card-large p,
body.sx-home-page .sx-focus-card p {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  line-height: 1.52 !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：
   1. 专注模式框太宽
   2. About 框宽度想接近上面“算法图解”小卡片
   修改方法：
   通过 sx-lower-grid 的 grid-template-columns 调整三列比例
========================================================= */

body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid {
  display: grid !important;

  /* 左：MOOD JOURNAL，中：专注模式，右：About
     原来大概率是 0.75fr 1.5fr 0.75fr
     现在把中间专注模式从 1.5fr 改小到 1.15fr
     把 About 从 0.75fr 改到 0.85fr，接近上面“算法图解”宽度 */
  grid-template-columns: 0.85fr 1.45fr 0.85fr !important;

  gap: 18px !important;

  /* 这个保留你之前让下面三个框上移的设置；
     如果你现在不是 -55px，就改成你当前满意的数值 */
  margin-top: -70px !important;

  align-items: stretch !important;
}

/* 保证三个卡片都吃满自己的网格宽度 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-topic-card,
body.sx-home-page .sx-lower-grid .sx-focus-card {
  width: 100% !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}
/* =========================================================
   修改问题：
   1. 数学笔记标题和说明文字向下移动
   2. 数学笔记图片稍微变大
   3. 保持数学笔记大卡片整体布局不乱
========================================================= */

/* 1. 数学笔记大卡片内部布局 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* 2. 数学笔记图片变大
   width 控制图片宽度
   height 控制图片高度
   margin-bottom 控制图片和标题之间的距离 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large .sx-math-cover {
  width: 72% !important;
  max-width: 360px !important;
  height: 105px !important;
  max-height: 105px !important;
  min-height: 105px !important;

  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;
  display: block !important;

  margin: 0.25rem auto 1.15rem auto !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  flex: 0 0 105px !important;
}

/* 3. 数学笔记标题和说明文字整体向下移动
   margin-top 数值越大，标题和说明越往下 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large .sx-nav-card-text {
  margin-top: -0.5rem !important;
}

/* 4. 数学笔记标题 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large .sx-nav-card-text h3 {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem !important;
}

/* 5. 数学笔记说明 */
body.sx-home-page .sx-feature-grid .sx-nav-card-large .sx-nav-card-text p {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  line-height: 1.55 !important;
}
</style>

<div class="sx-home">

<!-- 修改问题 7：首页右侧固定目录
     这个目录是手写目录，不依赖 Quarto 自动 TOC
     它会固定在右侧，不会随着正文滚动消失 -->
<nav class="sx-home-fixed-toc">
  <div class="sx-home-fixed-toc-title">目录</div>
  <a href="#top">首页介绍</a>
  <a href="#interactive-widgets">互动小部件</a>
  <a href="#content-navigation">内容导航</a>
  <a href="#tag-cloud">标签云</a>
  <a href="#post-list">文章列表</a>
</nav>

<h1 id="top" class="sx-home-main-title">sanxi 的学习与生活笔记</h1>

<p class="sx-home-subtitle">把学习、代码、建模、阅读和普通日子都留下来。</p>

<div class="sx-hero-grid">

<div class="sx-intro-card">
<div class="sx-eyebrow">SANXI BLOG · STUDY / CODE / JOURNAL</div>
<h2>把学习、代码、建模、阅读和普通日子都留下来</h2>
<p>
这里主要记录统计学、数学建模、编程学习、Quarto 博客搭建、算法学习、数值分析、Mood Journal 和一些日常思考。文章可以慢慢写，页面先搭起来，后面再一点点填充内容。
</p>
<div class="sx-button-row">
<a class="sx-btn sx-btn-dark" href="journal.html">进入日志</a>
<a class="sx-btn sx-btn-light" href="about.html">关于我</a>
<button class="sx-btn sx-btn-light" type="button" onclick="randomJump()">🎲 随便看看</button>
</div>
</div>

<div class="sx-status-card">
<h3>当前状态</h3>
<div class="sx-status-item">
<div class="sx-status-label">📍 身份</div>
<div class="sx-status-value">信息与计算科学 · 大二</div>
</div>
<div class="sx-status-item">
<div class="sx-status-label">📚 最近学习</div>
<div class="sx-status-value">Quarto / 算法图解 / 数值分析</div>
</div>
<div class="sx-status-item">
<div class="sx-status-label">🧭 长期方向</div>
<div class="sx-status-value">数据分析与算法优化</div>
</div>
<div class="sx-status-item">
<div class="sx-status-label">📅 今天</div>
<div id="today-date" class="sx-status-value">加载中...</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<h2 id="interactive-widgets" class="sx-home-section-title">互动小部件</h2>

<div class="sx-three-grid">

<div class="sx-mini-card sx-daily-card">
<div class="sx-card-label">今日一句</div>
<p id="daily-line" class="sx-daily-line">正在生成今日句子……</p>
<button class="sx-small-btn" type="button" onclick="changeDailyLine()">换一句</button>
</div>

<div class="sx-mini-card sx-mood-card">
<div class="sx-card-label">MOOD JOURNAL</div>
<div id="home-mood-word" class="sx-mood-word">读取中...</div>
<div id="home-mood-date" class="sx-mood-date">正在读取 mood.csv</div>
<div id="home-mood-title" class="sx-mood-title">请稍候...</div>
<div class="sx-mood-meta">
<span id="home-mood-average">平均心情：- / 5</span>
<span id="home-mood-count">共 - 条记录</span>
</div>
<a href="journal.html" class="sx-text-link">进入心情日志 →</a>
</div>

<!-- 修改问题 6：学习进度条
     这里不用 span / strong 写在同一行，避免 Quarto 或浏览器把它显示成文本 -->
<div class="sx-mini-card">
  <div class="sx-card-label">学习进度条</div>

  <div class="sx-progress-item">
    <div class="sx-progress-row">
      <div class="sx-progress-name">Python</div>
      <div class="sx-progress-percent">15%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sx-progress-track">
      <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 15%;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sx-progress-item">
    <div class="sx-progress-row">
      <div class="sx-progress-name">Quarto Blog</div>
      <div class="sx-progress-percent">62%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sx-progress-track">
      <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 62%;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sx-progress-item">
    <div class="sx-progress-row">
      <div class="sx-progress-name">数学建模</div>
      <div class="sx-progress-percent">39%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sx-progress-track">
      <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 39%;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sx-progress-item">
    <div class="sx-progress-row">
      <div class="sx-progress-name">MATLAB</div>
      <div class="sx-progress-percent">83%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sx-progress-track">
      <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 83%;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>


<h2 id="content-navigation" class="sx-home-section-title">内容导航</h2>

<div class="sx-feature-grid">

  <!-- 修改：数学笔记大卡片，统一使用 sx-nav-card sx-nav-card-large，避免 sx-topic-card / sx-nav-card 混用 -->
  <a class="sx-nav-card sx-nav-card-large" href="notes.html">
    <div class="sx-icon">Σ</div>

    <img
      class="sx-math-cover"
      src="assets/img/math-notes-cover.jpg"
      alt="数学笔记封面图"
    >

    <div class="sx-nav-card-text">
      <h3>数学笔记</h3>
      <p>把公式、模型、考试重点和应用方法拆开整理，适合复习，也适合长期积累。</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="sx-nav-card" href="topics/math-modeling/">
    <div class="sx-icon">⌘</div>
    <h3>数学建模</h3>
    <p>从题目分析、模型建立到代码求解，把建模过程写清楚。</p>
  </a>

  <a class="sx-nav-card" href="topics/matlab/">
    <div class="sx-icon">λ</div>
    <h3>MATLAB</h3>
    <p>数值计算、绘图、实验报告和建模常用代码记录。</p>
  </a>

  <a class="sx-nav-card" href="topics/numerical-analysis/">
    <div class="sx-icon">∞</div>
    <h3>数值分析</h3>
    <p>插值、拟合、方程求根、数值积分和常微分方程数值解。</p>
  </a>

  <a class="sx-nav-card" href="topics/algorithm/">
    <div class="sx-icon">DAG</div>
    <h3>算法图解</h3>
    <p>查找、排序、递归、图搜索和动态规划等算法学习笔记。</p>
  </a>

</div>

</div>

<!-- 修改：补上 sx-lower-grid 外层容器
     作用：让下方 MOOD JOURNAL / 专注模式 / About 三个卡片按网格排列，
     并且让前面写的 .sx-lower-grid CSS 正常生效。 -->
<div class="sx-lower-grid">

  <!-- 左侧：MOOD JOURNAL -->
  <a class="sx-topic-card" href="journal.html">
    <div class="sx-icon">☾</div>
    <h3>MOOD JOURNAL</h3>
    <p>用热力图记录每天心情，让普通日子也留下痕迹。</p>
  </a>

  <!-- 中间：专注模式，保持宽卡片 -->
  <a class="sx-topic-card sx-focus-card" href="xinliu.html">
    <div class="sx-icon">◉</div>
    <h3>专注模式</h3>
    <p>链接到心流页面，把注意力收回来，安静地完成今天最重要的任务。</p>
  </a>

  <!-- 右侧：About -->
  <a class="sx-topic-card" href="about.html">
    <div class="sx-icon">Φ</div>
    <h3>About</h3>
    <p>关于这个博客、关于我、联系方式和博客说明。</p>
  </a>

</div>

<h2 id="tag-cloud" class="sx-home-section-title">标签云</h2>

<div class="sx-tag-cloud">
<span>统计学</span>
<span>Python</span>
<span>R语言</span>
<span>数学建模</span>
<span>数值分析</span>
<span>算法图解</span>
<span>MATLAB</span>
<span>Mathematical</span>
<span>Mood Journal</span>
<span>Quarto</span>
<span>博客搭建</span>
<span>生活记录</span>
</div>

<h2 id="post-list" class="sx-home-section-title">文章列表</h2>

</div>

<script>
/* =========================================================
   sanxi 首页交互脚本：保留原逻辑，删除调试小部件相关函数
========================================================= */

const dailyLines = [
  "学习不是突然开悟，而是每天往脑子里偷偷塞一点东西。",
  "不需要一开始就完美，先把框架搭起来。",
  "你现在写下的每一行，都是以后可以回头看的路标。",
  "真正的进步不是一天完成很多，而是很多天都没有停下。",
  "慢慢来，长期坚持比短暂热情更重要。",
  "把普通日子认真记录下来，它就不再完全普通。",
  "今天也要留下认真生活过的证据。",
  "会变好的，不是因为某一天突然轻松，而是你没有停止修正自己。",
  "努力不是为了立刻看到结果，而是为了让未来多一种可能。",
  "把一件小事做好，也是在抵抗混乱。",
  "先完成，再完美。",
  "你可以慢，但不能一直停在原地。",
  "学习的意义不是马上改变世界，而是先慢慢改变自己的眼睛。",
  "今天比昨天多懂一点，就已经很不错。",
  "长期主义不是口号，是每天愿意重复一点正确的事。"
];

function changeDailyLine() {
  const line = dailyLines[Math.floor(Math.random() * dailyLines.length)];
  const target = document.getElementById("daily-line");
  if (target) {
    target.textContent = "“" + line + "”";
  }
}

const randomPages = [
  "journal.html",
  "notes.html",
  "about.html",
  "topics/index.html",
  "posts/welcome/"
];

function randomJump() {
  const page = randomPages[Math.floor(Math.random() * randomPages.length)];
  window.location.href = page;
}

function updateToday() {
  const now = new Date();
  const text = `${now.getFullYear()} / ${now.getMonth() + 1} / ${now.getDate()}`;
  const target = document.getElementById("today-date");
  if (target) {
    target.textContent = text;
  }
}

function parseCSVLine(line) {
  const result = [];
  let current = "";
  let inQuotes = false;

  for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
    const char = line[i];

    if (char === '"' && line[i + 1] === '"') {
      current += '"';
      i++;
    } else if (char === '"') {
      inQuotes = !inQuotes;
    } else if (char === "," && !inQuotes) {
      result.push(current.trim());
      current = "";
    } else {
      current += char;
    }
  }

  result.push(current.trim());
  return result;
}

function moodWord(score) {
  const n = Number(score);
  if (n <= 1) return "低落";
  if (n === 2) return "偏低";
  if (n === 3) return "普通";
  if (n === 4) return "不错";
  if (n >= 5) return "很好";
  return "未知";
}

function formatMoodDate(dateText) {
  const date = new Date(dateText);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    return dateText;
  }
  return `${date.getFullYear()} / ${date.getMonth() + 1} / ${date.getDate()}`;
}

function todayISO() {
  const now = new Date();
  const y = now.getFullYear();
  const m = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  const d = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
  return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
}

function normalizeDateText(dateText) {
  const text = String(dateText || "").trim().replace(/\//g, "-");
  const parts = text.split("-");
  if (parts.length < 3) return text;
  return `${parts[0].padStart(4, "0")}-${parts[1].padStart(2, "0")}-${parts[2].padStart(2, "0")}`;
}

function averageMood(records) {
  if (!records.length) {
    return "-";
  }
  const total = records.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item.mood || 0), 0);
  return (total / records.length).toFixed(1);
}

async function loadMoodJournalCard() {
  const moodWordBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-word");
  const moodDateBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-date");
  const moodTitleBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-title");
  const moodAverageBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-average");
  const moodCountBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-count");

  if (!moodWordBox || !moodDateBox || !moodTitleBox || !moodAverageBox || !moodCountBox) {
    return;
  }

  try {
    const response = await fetch("assets/data/mood.csv?v=" + Date.now(), { cache: "no-store" });
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error("mood.csv 加载失败");
    }

    const text = await response.text();
    const lines = text.trim().split(/\r?\n/).filter(Boolean);

    if (lines.length <= 1) {
      moodWordBox.textContent = "暂无";
      moodDateBox.textContent = "mood.csv 暂无记录";
      moodTitleBox.textContent = "今天还没有写心情。";
      moodAverageBox.textContent = "平均心情：- / 5";
      moodCountBox.textContent = "共 0 条记录";
      return;
    }

    const headers = parseCSVLine(lines[0]);

    const records = lines.slice(1).map(line => {
      const values = parseCSVLine(line);
      const item = {};

      headers.forEach((header, index) => {
        item[header] = values[index] || "";
      });

      item.date = normalizeDateText(item.date);
      item.mood = Number(item.mood);
      item.energy = Number(item.energy);

      return item;
    }).filter(item => item.date);

    records.sort((a, b) => b.date.localeCompare(a.date));

    const today = todayISO();
    const todayRecord = records.find(item => item.date === today);
    const latest = todayRecord || records[0];

    moodWordBox.textContent = moodWord(latest.mood);
    moodDateBox.textContent = `${formatMoodDate(latest.date)}｜心情 ${latest.mood}/5｜精力 ${latest.energy}/5`;
    moodTitleBox.textContent = latest.title || "今天还没有写标题。";
    moodAverageBox.textContent = `平均心情：${averageMood(records)} / 5`;
    moodCountBox.textContent = `共 ${records.length} 条记录`;
  } catch (error) {
    moodWordBox.textContent = "暂无";
    moodDateBox.textContent = "读取失败";
    moodTitleBox.textContent = "请检查 assets/data/mood.csv 是否存在。";
    moodAverageBox.textContent = "平均心情：- / 5";
    moodCountBox.textContent = "共 - 条记录";
  }
}

function fixHomeNavbarDropdown() {
  const dropdownItems = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar-nav .nav-item.dropdown");

  dropdownItems.forEach(item => {
    const toggle = item.querySelector(":scope > a.nav-link.dropdown-toggle");
    if (!toggle) return;

    const text = toggle.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, "").trim();

    if (text === "首页") {
      toggle.classList.remove("dropdown-toggle");
      toggle.removeAttribute("data-bs-toggle");
      toggle.removeAttribute("role");
      toggle.removeAttribute("aria-expanded");
      toggle.setAttribute("href", "index.html");

      const menu = item.querySelector(":scope > .dropdown-menu");
      if (menu) menu.remove();

      item.classList.remove("dropdown");
    }
  });
}

window.changeDailyLine = changeDailyLine;
window.randomJump = randomJump;

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  fixHomeNavbarDropdown();
  changeDailyLine();
  updateToday();
  loadMoodJournalCard();
});
</script>
```
